docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,330.00 FILED BY WU, JING MING AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, DALEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, JING MING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $20.00) SERVED OCT-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, DALEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-03-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JING MING WU & DEFENDANT DALEN CHEN, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS DAIEN CHEN. FACE PAGE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DOES NOT SET FORTH THE TIME OR DEPARTMENT FOR THE HEARING. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-03-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
